nasb.text: But He answered and said, “It is written, ‘Man shall not live on bread alone, but on every word that proceeds out of the mouth of God.’ ”

esv.text: But he answered, “It is written, “‘Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that comes from the mouth of God.’”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“經上記著： ‘人活著，不是單靠食物， 更要靠　神口裡所出的一切話。’”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“圣经上说，‘人活着不是单靠食物，乃是靠上帝口中的每一句话。’”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“经上记着： ‘人活着不是单靠食物， 而是靠神口里所出的每一句话。’      ”
